channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Revolutionizing policing: Kazakhstan’s trailblazing Digital Policeman initiative
item.description: In the era of digital transformation, public safety stands at a critical crossroads. Law enforcement agencies globally are under increasing scrutiny to enhance transparency, efficiency, and trust within their communities.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The Digital Policeman Initiative: Redefining Public Safety in Kazakhstan
item.description: Kazakhstan's 'Digital Policeman' initiative is revolutionizing public safety with smart badges and military-grade technology, setting a benchmark for global law enforcement modernization.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple delivery hubs. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union launched a strike at seven of the company's delivery hubs less than a week before Christmas.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump team affirms he's leader of GOP amid 'President Musk' barbs
item.description: President-elect Trump's transition team pushed back against Democratic lawmakers who suggested Elon Musk is the "real leader" of the Republican Party after his aggressive pressure campaign against a stopgap spending measure.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Elon Musk considers funding Nigel Farage's populist party, a move that could shake up UK politics
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It’s a photo that sent a tremor through British politics: Elon Musk flanked by British politician Nigel Farage and a wealthy backer, in front of a gilt-framed painting of a young Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Australian who falsely claimed to have invented bitcoin is found in contempt of UK court
item.description: An Australian computer scientist who falsely claimed to be the founder of the bitcoin cryptocurrency has been found to have committed contempt of court by breaching an order of London’s High Court.
item.dc:creator: Pan Pylas, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Rand Paul floats Elon Musk for Speaker
item.description: Sen. Rand Paul (R-Ky.) suggested Elon Musk serve as Speaker in a Thursday morning post on X following contentious debates over the continuing resolution (CR). “The Speaker of the House need not be a member of Congress . . . ,” Paul wrote.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: How 1 man got scammed in seconds using Google
item.description: Scammers have become skilled at creating convincing fake websites that can easily fool unsuspecting users. The CyberGuy offers tips to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sony announces new 'Amethyst' collaboration with AMD to develop 'machine learning' technology in games
item.description: PlayStation console architect Mark Cerny has announced a new collaboration between Sony and AMD codenamed 'Amethyst'.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: New Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra and Plus renders give us a clear look at their screens
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Plus and Ultra might only look subtly different to their predecessors, judging by new leaked images.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How will AI agents be priced? CIOs need to pay attention
item.description: Agentic AI, the more focused alternative to general-purpose generative AI, is gaining momentum in the enterprise, with Forrester having named it a top emerging technology for 2025 in June.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 5 job negotiation tips for CAIOs
item.description: The CAIO is becoming more of a strategically important role for most if not all organizations as they look to capitalize on the promise of AI technologies across the enterprise.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The US egg industry kills 350 million chicks a year. New technology offers an alternative
item.description: Every year the U.S. egg industry kills about 350 million male chicks because they will never lay eggs and so have little monetary value.
item.dc:creator: Scott Mcfetridge, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: IT/OT convergence propels zero-trust security efforts
item.description: Zero-trust security is essential to enterprises that are converging operational technology (OT) with IT infrastructure. New research from Enterprise Management Associates (EMA) identified how this convergence influences zero-trust strategy and implementation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: JetBrains launches search portal for Kotlin Multiplatform libraries
item.description: JetBrains has introduced klibs.io, a web service intended to make it easier to find libraries for Kotlin Multiplatform, a project that allows developers to build cross-platform mobile, desktop, and web apps from the same code base.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Cupertino: Iconic Flint Center undergoes demolition five years after closing
item.description: The theater where Steve Jobs unveiled the first Macintosh computer in 1984 is reduced to rubble. The Foothill-De Anza Community College District has plans the site.
item.dc:creator: Stephanie Lam, The Mercury News

item.title: Cisco grabs SnapAttack for threat detection
item.description: Cisco is acquiring threat-detection startup SnapAttack for an undisclosed amount as it continues to expand its security portfolio.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Analyze text using natural language with Claude for Google Sheets
item.description: You can do a lot more with generative AI (genAI) in Google Sheets than get help writing spreadsheet formulas.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: DoD edges toward goal of ubiquitous connectivity — connect anything, provide access anywhere
item.description: DoD’s embrace of commercial technologies offers big opportunities but creates new network design and security considerations, Verizon’s Ken Gonzales explains. The post DoD edges toward goal of ubiquitous connectivity — connect anything, provide access anywhere first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jared Serbu, Federal News Network

item.title: The case for private clouds for data management in government
item.description: When it comes to taking advantage of AI, storing data in a cost-effective, massively scalable private or hybrid cloud solution is often the best choice. The post The case for private clouds for data management in government first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Senate report alleges Amazon rejected warehouse safety recommendations due to productivity concerns
item.description: At least two internal Amazon studies found a link between how quickly the online retailer's warehouse workers perform tasks and workplace injuries, but the company rejected many safety recommendations out of concern the proposed changes might reduce productivity, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: CompTIA introduces foundational tech certification
item.description: CompTIA has created a certification designed to provide individuals with broad foundational and digital skills that can be used to build a career in technology.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to delete multiple emails at once on Android
item.description: Cut through all the digital clutter and delete multiple emails from your Android simultaneously. Kurt the CyberGuy explains how it's done.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eyewitness accounts of New Jersey drones include politicians, journalist
item.description: Here are some of the firsthand accounts of the drone sightings, as told to NewsNation by eyewitnesses.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Trump hosts Apple CEO at Mar-a-Lago as big tech leaders continue outreach to president-elect
item.description: Trump has said he has spoken with Cook about the company's long-running tax battles with the European Union.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Groups urge Trump to reinforce National Cyber Director role
item.description: The role of the White House national cyber director has emerged as a key issue for former cyber officials as the Trump administration prepares to take over. The post Groups urge Trump to reinforce National Cyber Director role first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network
